general.text: {name}, you bring so much joy to everyone around you!
{name}, your positive energy is absolutely contagious!
{name}, you have a heart of gold and it shows in everything you do!
The world is a better place with {name} in it!
{name}, you're capable of amazing things!
{name}, your smile can light up the darkest room!
{name}, you have such a beautiful soul!
{name}, your kindness makes a difference every single day!
{name}, you're stronger than you know and braver than you believe!
{name}, your unique perspective makes the world more interesting!
{name}, you make every single day brighter just by being you!
Everyone loves being around {name} because you radiate pure awesomeness!
{name}, you're the kind of person that makes life worth living!
Being around {name} feels like a warm hug for the soul!
{name}, you have this magical way of making everything better!

friendship.text: {name}, you're the kind of friend everyone wishes they had!
My friendship with {name} is one of my life's greatest treasures!
{name} always knows how to make me laugh, even on the worst days!
I'm so grateful to have a friend as loyal as {name}!
{name}, you're not just a friend, you're family!
Thank you {name} for always being there, no matter what!
{name}, you make every adventure more fun!
Having {name} as a friend is like having a built-in cheerleader!
{name}, you're the peanut butter to my jelly!
Friends like {name} are harder to find than a four-leaf clover!

personality.text: {name}, your creativity knows no bounds!
{name}, you have the most wonderful sense of humor!
{name}, your intelligence is inspiring!
{name}, you're so thoughtful and considerate!
{name}, your passion for life is truly motivating!
{name}, you have such a warm and welcoming presence!
{name}, your honesty is refreshing and admirable!
{name}, you're incredibly resilient and that's amazing!
{name}, your curiosity makes you endlessly interesting!
{name}, you have a natural gift for making others feel valued!

funny.text: {name}, you're like a human version of a golden retriever - everyone loves you!
{name}, you're proof that awesome people actually exist!
{name}, if you were a vegetable, you'd be a cute-cumber!
{name}, you're more fun than a barrel of monkeys... and way cuter!
{name}, you're the sprinkles on my donut!
{name}, you're like WiFi for my soul - you just get me!
{name}, you're cooler than the other side of the pillow!
{name}, you're basically a superhero, but with better snacks!
{name}, you're the reason I smile at my phone like an idiot!
{name}, you're more refreshing than a cold drink on a hot day!

support.text: {name}, I believe in you, even when you don't believe in yourself!
{name}, you've got this, and I've got you!
{name}, every challenge is just an opportunity for you to shine!
{name}, you're handling this with so much grace and strength!
{name}, remember: you've survived 100% of your bad days so far!
{name}, your comeback is going to be legendary!
{name}, this tough time doesn't define you - your resilience does!
{name}, you're growing stronger with every challenge!
{name}, I'm so proud of how far you've come!
{name}, better days are coming, and you'll be ready for them!

love.text: {name}, you're the love of my life and my best friend!
{name}, every love song makes sense now that I know you!
{name}, you're my forever and always!
{name}, I fall in love with you more every single day!
{name}, you're the missing piece to my heart!
{name}, loving you is the easiest thing I've ever done!
{name}, you're my soulmate in every lifetime!
{name}, my heart beats faster every time I see you!
{name}, you're the reason I believe in true love!
{name}, I'd choose you over and over in every universe!

birthday.text: {name}, happy birthday to the most amazing person ever!
{name}, you're not older, you're more legendary!
{name}, may your birthday be as fabulous as you are!
{name}, another year of you being awesome!
{name}, you age like fine wine - getting better!
{name}, happy birthday to my favorite human!
{name}, you're not aging, you're leveling up!
{name}, may all your birthday wishes come true!
{name}, you deserve the world on your birthday!
{name}, cheers to another trip around the sun!

{name}, your love makes our family complete!
{name}, you're the best thing that happened to our family!

boss.text: {name}, you're the best boss ever!

{name}, your tail wags make everyone smile!

anniversary.text: {name}, happy anniversary to an amazing couple!
{name}, your love story is beautiful!
{name}, you two are relationship goals!
{name}, your love grows stronger each year!
{name}, cheers to your special day!
{name}, your bond is unbreakable!
{name}, you make marriage look easy!
{name}, your love inspires everyone!
{name}, here's to many more years!
{name}, your happiness is contagious!

goodbye.text: {name}, this isn't goodbye, it's see you later!
{name}, you'll always have a home here!

general.text: {name}, you're like a cloud - when you disappear, it's a beautiful day!
{name}, I'd agree with you but then we'd both be wrong!
{name}, you bring everyone joy... when you leave the room!
{name}, I'd explain it to you but I left my crayons at home!
{name}, the world is better with you... somewhere else in it!
{name}, you're not stupid, you just have bad luck thinking!
{name}, I'd call you a tool but that implies you're actually useful!
{name}, your smile lights up a room... when you leave it!
{name}, you're like a software update - nobody wants you but here you are!
{name}, you're the reason they put instructions on shampoo!
{name}, I'd insult you but I'm pretty sure you've heard them all before!
{name}, you're proof that evolution can go in reverse!
{name}, you're like a participation trophy - nice but nobody knows why!
{name}, your energy is contagious... and everyone's getting sick!
{name}, you're the human version of a typo!

friendship.text: {name}, you're the kind of friend that gives enemies ideas!
{name}, our friendship is a treasure... of embarrassing secrets!
{name}, you always know how to make me laugh... at your own jokes!
{name}, I'm grateful for you... mostly for the free therapy of venting!
{name}, you're not family... but you've seen too much to leave!
{name}, thanks for always being there... to witness my eye rolls!
{name}, you make every adventure... a cautionary tale!
{name}, having you as a friend is like having a built-in embarrassment generator!
{name}, you're the crust to my pizza - unnecessary but stuck on!
{name}, friends like you are rare... thank goodness!
{name}, our friendship is my favorite warning story!
{name}, you're the sibling I'd disown if I could!
{name}, life with you is an adventure... in regret!
{name}, you're my person... to blame for everything!
{name}, thanks for being the reason I have trust issues!

personality.text: {name}, your creativity knows bounds... unfortunately!
{name}, you have a sense of humor... mostly accidental!
{name}, your intelligence is... aspirational!
{name}, you're thoughtful... about the wrong things!
{name}, your passion for life is truly... exhausting!
{name}, you have a warm presence... like global warming!
{name}, your honesty is... brutal, but not in a good way!
{name}, you're resilient... to feedback!
{name}, your curiosity makes you... suspicious!
{name}, you make others feel valued... of their patience!
{name}, your wit is duller than a butter knife!
{name}, you have confidence... misplaced but present!
{name}, your empathy has limits... like a small yard!
{name}, you're brave... in your dreams!
{name}, your authenticity is why people pretend!

funny.text: {name}, you're like a golden retriever... but less house-trained!
{name}, you're proof that evolution has glitches!
{name}, if you were a vegetable, you'd be a dis-cucumber!
{name}, you're less fun than a barrel of wet monkeys!
{name}, you're the burnt sprinkles on my stale donut!
{name}, you're like dial-up WiFi - slow and annoying!
{name}, you're warmer than the other side of the pillow... gross!
{name}, you're basically a sidekick... to a sidekick!
{name}, you're the reason I frown at my phone!
{name}, you're less refreshing than warm soda!
{name}, you're like a human participation award!
{name}, you're the NPC energy in a main character world!
{name}, you're more extra than my ex!
{name}, you're the human equivalent of a wet sock!
{name}, you're like cloudy Monday mornings!

support.text: {name}, I believe in you... to eventually prove me wrong!
{name}, you've got this... wrong, but you've got it!
{name}, every challenge is an opportunity... to fail creatively!
{name}, you're handling this with... interesting choices!
{name}, you've survived 100% of your bad days... barely!
{name}, your comeback will be... something!
{name}, this tough time defines you... unfortunately!
{name}, you're growing... away from success!
{name}, I'm proud of how far you've come... from common sense!
{name}, better days are coming... for everyone else!
{name}, you're a warrior... in a losing battle!
{name}, your strength is... questionable!
{name}, you're built for this... disaster!
{name}, every step forward is two steps back!
{name}, you're braver than you believe... to keep trying!

love.text: {name}, you're the reason I'm single... because I'm waiting for you!
{name}, I'd fight for your love... but you're not worth it!
{name}, you're like my ex... problematic!
{name}, our love story is more drama than romance!
{name}, you're the thorn in my rose!
{name}, I love you... said no one ever about you!
{name}, you're like a relationship status - complicated!
{name}, dating you is like a horror movie - scary and unpredictable!
{name}, you're the reason I have trust issues with love!
{name}, our love is like a broken clock - right twice a day!

birthday.text: {name}, happy birthday! You're not older, just more... experienced!
{name}, you're not aging, you're decomposing!
{name}, another year closer to needing a walker!
{name}, you're like milk - expiration date approaching!
{name}, happy birthday to someone who's definitely not 21... again!
{name}, you're not old, you're just chronologically gifted!
{name}, your age is like a software version - outdated!
{name}, happy birthday! Don't worry, wrinkles are character!
{name}, you're not having a midlife crisis, you're just sad!
{name}, another year of you pretending to be an adult!

work.text: {name}, you're the reason the office needs therapy!
{name}, your work ethic is... aspirational!
{name}, you're like a broken printer - always jamming!
{name}, you're the office plant - barely alive!
{name}, your productivity is on airplane mode!
{name}, you're the reason we have trust falls!
{name}, you're like a meeting that could've been an email!
{name}, your contributions are... noted and ignored!
{name}, you're the human version of a CC email!
{name}, you're why the office has a snack budget - stress eating!

fitness.text: {name}, you're not working out, you're working up an appetite!
{name}, your fitness journey is more journey than fitness!
{name}, you're like a gym membership - expensive and unused!
{name}, you're not sweating, you're just leaking!
{name}, your workout is more selfie than exercise!
{name}, you're like a treadmill - going nowhere fast!
{name}, your gains are like unicorns - mythical!
{name}, you're not building muscle, you're building excuses!
{name}, your fitness goals are more like fitness suggestions!
{name}, you're like a protein shake - all foam, no substance!

family.text: {name}, you're the black sheep... and not even a cute one!
{name}, family photos would be better without you!
{name}, you're why our family needs therapy!
{name}, even the dog avoids you at gatherings!
{name}, you're the skeleton in the family closet!
{name}, family reunions would be peaceful without you!
{name}, you're adopted... emotionally!
{name}, the family tree has a rotten branch!
{name}, you're the reason we have trust issues!
{name}, even grandma's disappointed in you!

teacher.text: {name}, you teach... but do the students learn? Doubtful!
{name}, your lessons are like a lullaby - everyone sleeps!
{name}, you're the reason students hate this subject!
{name}, your patience is thin... like paper!
{name}, you grade like a broken printer - everything's wrong!
{name}, your homework assignments are cruel punishment!
{name}, your pop quizzes are just mean!
{name}, you talk like a robot - monotone much?
{name}, your class is detention with extra steps!

boss.text: {name}, you manage... barely!

{name}, you're why people update their resumes on Mondays!

{name}, you're the reason the office has a stress ball budget!
{name}, your feedback is just criticism with a smile!
{name}, you delegate like you're delegating blame!
{name}, your open door policy is just for show!

anniversary.text: {name}, you two argue more than couples on reality TV!

{name}, you're couple goals... for a comedy show!
{name}, your romance is like a sitcom - predictable!
{name}, you share everything... including bad habits!
{name}, your love survived... barely!

graduation.text: {name}, you graduated? Someone check for miracles!
{name}, your diploma is mostly for decoration!
{name}, you survived school... by what metric?!
{name}, your student loans are bigger than your GPA!
{name}, your cap and gown hide the stress!
{name}, your future is bright... because you're delusional!
{name}, you're proof that participation trophies work!

goodbye.text: {name}, we'll miss you... said no one!
{name}, your replacement will be an upgrade!
{name}, don't let the door hit you on the way out!
{name}, you're like a bad episode - finally ending!
{name}, goodbye is music to our ears!
